xai_method_descriptions.SHAP: SHAP (SHapley Additive exPlanations) calculates feature importance by examining how each feature affects the model's prediction.
xai_method_descriptions.LIME: LIME (Local Interpretable Model-agnostic Explanations) builds a simpler model around a specific prediction to explain it.
xai_method_descriptions.PFI: PFI (Permutation Feature Importance) works by randomly shuffling a feature and measuring the decrease in model performance.
xai_method_descriptions.PDP: PDP (Partial Dependence Plots) shows the marginal effect of a feature on the predicted outcome.
xai_method_descriptions.GradCAM: GradCAM visualizes class-discriminative regions by combining gradients with feature maps.
xai_method_descriptions.GradCAM_pp: GradCAM++ improves GradCAM with better localization and multi-object handling.
xai_method_descriptions.Integrated_Gradients: Integrated Gradients attributes predictions by integrating gradients along a path from baseline to input.
xai_method_descriptions.SmoothGrad: SmoothGrad reduces noise in saliency maps by averaging gradients over noisy inputs.
xai_method_descriptions.LIME_Image: LIME for images explains by perturbing superpixels and fitting a local linear model.
xai_method_descriptions.SHAP_Image: SHAP applied to image inputs for pixel-wise importance attribution.
xai_method_descriptions.Saliency_Maps: Saliency maps highlight input regions that most influence the model output.
xai_method_descriptions.Guided_Backprop: Guided Backprop backpropagates only positive gradients to highlight activating features.
xai_method_descriptions.Guided_GradCAM: Guided GradCAM combines GradCAM with Guided Backprop for finer-grained visualizations.
xai_method_descriptions.ScoreCAM: ScoreCAM uses forward activation maps and their importance scores, no gradients needed.
xai_method_descriptions.LayerCAM: LayerCAM creates CAM from any layer with pixel-level localization.
xai_method_descriptions.Attention_Maps: Attention maps from transformer or attention layers visualize where the model focuses.
xai_method_descriptions.LIME_Text: LIME for text by masking tokens and measuring their impact on predictions.
xai_method_descriptions.SHAP_Text: SHAP for text models attributes importance to tokens or subwords.
xai_method_descriptions.Integrated_Gradients_Text: Integrated Gradients applied to text embeddings for token attribution.
xai_method_descriptions.Attention_Weights: Attention weights from transformer models show which tokens influence outputs.
xai_method_descriptions.Gradient_Text: Gradient-based attribution for text via gradient magnitude per token.
xai_method_descriptions.DeepLIFT_Text: DeepLIFT assigns importance by comparing activations to a reference input.
xai_method_descriptions.Occlusion_Text: Occlusion measures importance by replacing tokens and observing prediction change.
xai_method_descriptions.Shapley_Sampling_Text: Shapley value estimation via sampling for text feature importance.
xai_method_descriptions.Rationale_Extraction: Rationale extraction identifies minimal token spans that justify predictions.
xai_method_descriptions.SHAP_TS: SHAP for time series attributes importance to timesteps or features.
xai_method_descriptions.LIME_TS: LIME for time series explains by perturbing segments and fitting local models.
xai_method_descriptions.Attention_TS: Attention mechanisms in time series models show temporal importance.
xai_method_descriptions.Feature_Importance_TS: Feature importance for time series models (e.g., tree-based).
xai_method_descriptions.Temporal_Attribution: Temporal attribution assigns importance across time steps.
xai_method_descriptions.Integrated_Gradients_TS: Integrated Gradients for time series inputs.
xai_method_descriptions.Permutation_Importance_TS: Permutation importance for time series features.
